summary: CRUD, team composition, fork/clone/push/pull, ref graph, versioning, and run-lifecycle guards all pass with strong JSON error structure; fails isolated to push silently dropping skill summary, pull --force silently reverting without report, and an edit-ref hint that contradicts the flag's actual acceptance rule.

CRUD, versioning, dirty-workspace gates, and run lifecycle all pass; fails concentrate in error quality: internal 500s on missing --name/--to, misleading push-conflict hint, unguarded delete of referenced skills, silent lowercasing of names, and a silent no-op version bump on empty edit.
Passes on core run/push/pull flows; fails on hidden run-note surface, read-after-write consistency, guarded delete, org naming, and version-pinned fork syntax.
